comingSoon.title: Coming soon.
comingSoon.body: Adelaide Daily is being built. It will help you understand the Bitcoin macro environment without the noise.

dashboard.signalsSectionLead: Four groups make up the 14-point score. Expand a card to see the signals inside.
dashboard.historicalLead: Where the environment has been over the last year.
dashboard.historicalAriaLabel: Macro environment score over the last 12 months
dashboard.methodologyLead: Every signal, threshold, and weight is documented on diBoaS Analytics.

fallback.outageBody: We are restoring the connection to our data sources. The methodology and historical archive remain available.
fallback.partialOutageBody: Most signals are current. One or more upstream feeds are catching up; confidence may be lower than usual.

host.regulatory: diBoaS does not provide investment advice. The framework on this page summarizes the macro and structural environment for Bitcoin for educational purposes only. Crypto-asset values are highly volatile and your capital is at risk. Information is intended for residents of the EU, US, UK, and Brazil where local distribution is permitted; nothing here constitutes a solicitation in any other jurisdiction.
